title: Create: Schematics+
description: Revamp the Create mod schematic table!
body:
Create: Schematics+ is a mod that adds an ingame browser and folder support!



Click the folders button on the top of your screen when you open a schematic table!!["Folders" button on top of screen above the UI for the Create Mod Schematic table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7f054b2b194ae59d563cfeb0ea566f4553f3f74.png)
you can create folders, edit the name of them and schematics all ingame!

Any suggestions/bugs, let me know in my GitHub!
https://github.com/MarzRovin/Create-schematics-plus
